sourceRef: tip:Training time conversions without the headache

slides.headline: Streamline GIBill Certifications
slides.body: Automate your VA School Certifying process. No more manual data entry.

slides.headline: Batch Certifications
slides.body: Upload student data in bulk to save time and reduce errors.

slides.headline: Compliance in Minutes
slides.body: Quickly check and maintain compliance with Chapter 33 regulations.

slides.headline: Support Student Veterans
slides.body: Empower student veterans with seamless GIBill benefits.

slides.headline: Simplified Reporting
slides.body: Generate accurate and comprehensive reports for audits.

slides.headline: Track and Trace
slides.body: Monitor and manage student certifications with ease.

outline.caption: Streamline your VA School Certifying process with VASCO Assistant Pro. Batch certify students, ensure compliance, support veterans, and simplify reporting. Get started today.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Support Student Veterans,' as it could benefit from a more compelling headline to match the others.
